expectations.text: Answers use the review format with clear Recommendation, Why, and Trade-offs sections
expectations.evidence: Uses 'Recommendation / Rationale / What to watch for / What to avoid' structure. Different from the review format. No explicit 'Trade-offs' sections — alternatives discussed under 'What to avoid'.

expectations.text: Answers reference the existing Knowlune tech stack (React, Vite, Tailwind, or specific patterns found in codebase)
expectations.evidence: Deeply references 27+ Dexie tables, 22 zustand stores, PWA/Workbox caching config, lru-cache v11.2.7, specific files and functions.

expectations.text: Explicitly indicates waiting for user approval before proceeding (review mode behavior)
expectations.evidence: No review mode behavior — baseline had no skill instructing it to wait for approval.

expectations.text: Answers demonstrate technical depth — not surface-level generic advice
expectations.evidence: References specific Workbox cache configs (200 entries/30-day TTL), module-level _progressCache pattern, specific table names (youtubeVideoCache, courseThumbnails).
